# ERPNext / Frappe v15 — MCP Context Index

Use this index to find the right rule or skill file. All paths are relative to this repo.

## Rules (from AGENTS.md)
- rules/AGENTS_RULES.md — Global rules, naming, logging, do not modify core apps.

## Frontend (JavaScript)
- skills/frontend/set_value.md
- skills/frontend/field_properties.md
